forgot_password_sub: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password
reset_email_sent: Reset email sent! Check your inbox it may be in the spam folder
no_account_found: No account found with this email
resend_request_confirm: Do you want to resend the request?
verification_sent_to: A verification email was sent to:
check_spam: Can't find the email? Check your spam or junk folder
email_not_verified: Email not verified yet, please check your inbox
verification_email_sent: Verification email sent! Also check your spam folder
when_you_watch:
Reports will appear here
once you start watching someone
wrong_selection_content: Please select "Entire screen" in the next screen, not a single app
background_launch_content:
Your device restricts apps from running after restart.

In the next screen:
• Change Automatic → Manual
• Enable Auto-launch
• Enable Secondary launch
• Enable Run in background
usage_access_content:
Required to track which apps are currently being used.

Path: Settings → Apps → Special app access → Usage access → Enable this app
notification_required:
Required to show monitoring status.

Please enable in App Settings
notification_allow:
Required to show monitoring status.
Please allow this permission
battery_content:
Required to keep the service running continuously.

Tap Continue → then Allow in the system dialog
start_monitoring_content:
This will monitor your screen activity in the background.

The app captures your screen every 15 seconds and analyzes it.

In the next screen, select "Entire screen" — not a single app.

Continue?
stop_watching_confirm: Are you sure you want to stop watching {name}? They will be notified
remove_watcher_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from watching you? They will be notified
remove_self_watcher_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove yourself from watching {name}?
accept_confirm: Are you sure you want to accept this request?
own_device: You're about to monitor your own device
password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
password_needs_letter: Password must contain at least one letter
password_needs_number: Password must contain at least one number
password_needs_symbol: Password must contain at least one symbol
delete_chat_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete all reports for {name}?
remove_self_watched_confirm: Are you sure you want to stop watching yourself?
ai_tip: Copy and send it to any AI for deeper analysis
copied_log: Copied! You can send it to any AI bot for deeper analysis
custom_id_taken: Custom ID already taken, choose another
